description_long: This figure depicts a muscular adult male with a bare torso, adorned with tribal-style tattoos on his arms, chest, and back. He wears loose-fitting jeans with a visible belt and low-slung waistband, paired with chunky sneakers. His hands are gloved in black fingerless gloves, and he sports a necklace with a large pendant. The character's hair is styled in long, thick dreadlocks that fall past his shoulders. His facial expression is stern, with defined cheekbones and a strong jawline. The overall appearance suggests a streetwise, urban persona with a rebellious edge.
description: A muscular, tattooed adult male with dreadlocks, fingerless gloves, jeans, and sneakers, exuding a tough urban style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the character's tattoos, necklace, bare chest, gloves, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arm tattoos, profile of the face, and the length of the dreadlocks.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full back tattoo, the fall of the dreadlocks, and the fit of the jeans.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the right arm tattoos, glove details, and the side profile of the face and body.
attribute_clothing_type: casual jeans with a low waistband, fingerless gloves, chunky sneakers, and a necklace
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended outward
